title: conflict_verdict
description: Verdict from the conflict_resolver agent: was the conflict resolved?

resolved.description: True if ALL conflict markers have been removed from ALL conflicted files.

confidence.description: Confidence in the resolution (0–1). Below 0.7 should set resolved=false.

unresolvable_files.description: Files the agent could not resolve. Only non-empty when resolved=false.

resolution_summary.description: Brief description of how conflicts were resolved, or why resolution failed.
